text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day Curren Chan starts seriously
training for the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shows real ability as a sprinter. However, she
still spends much of her training time on social
media, so it's impossible to tell how serious she is
about racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I ask her again about her future goals, she
says she wants everyone to know about "Cute
Curren." But when I ask for her racing goals, she
says she doesn't have any.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She does, however, show some interest in the Triple Tiara. This might be difficult considering her distance aptitude, but I'm sure she has a plan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What are Curren Chan's true intentions? I'm
already being led around by the nose as our days
of chasing cuteness begin.
